'''razhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoanemia|pseudoanemia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoanemia|pseudoanemia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| razhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzhecheth|ræzhecheth]] || [[word:ræzhechej|ræzhechej]] || [[word:ræzhechesh|ræzhechesh]] || [[word:ræzheche|ræzheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhozhochoth|razhozhochoth]] || [[word:razhozhochoj|razhozhochoj]] || [[word:razhozhochosh|razhozhochosh]] || [[word:razhozhocho|razhozhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhochoth|razhochoth]] || [[word:razhochoj|razhochoj]] || [[word:razhochosh|razhochosh]] || [[word:razhocho|razhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhofchoth|razhofchoth]] || [[word:razhofchoj|razhofchoj]] || [[word:razhofchosh|razhofchosh]] || [[word:razhofchof|razhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razhochotho|razhochotho]] || [[word:razhochojo|razhochojo]] || [[word:razhochosho|razhochosho]] || [[word:razhochoko|razhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razhochoth|razhochoth]] || [[word:razhochoj|razhochoj]] || [[word:razhochosh|razhochosh]] || [[word:razhocho|razhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razhochothol|razhochothol]] || [[word:razhochojol|razhochojol]] || [[word:razhochoshol|razhochoshol]] || [[word:razhochokol|razhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razhochothotho|razhochothotho]] || [[word:razhochojojo|razhochojojo]] || [[word:razhochoshosho|razhochoshosho]] || [[word:razhochoko|razhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razhochothon|razhochothon]] || [[word:razhochojon|razhochojon]] || [[word:razhochoshon|razhochoshon]] || [[word:razhochokon|razhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razhochothoro|razhochothoro]] || [[word:razhochojoro|razhochojoro]] || [[word:razhochoshoro|razhochoshoro]] || [[word:razhochokoro|razhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
